root_cause: Service mesh control plane is unavailable and blocking sidecar traffic
evidence: Pod payments/payments-api-7c8db9f79b-2kq9m has a service-mesh sidecar reporting control-plane sync failure

Representative sidecar control-plane failure: Envoy proxy is NOT ready: config not received from Istiod: xDS connection error: rpc error: code = Unavailable desc = connection error: transport is closing
Observed 2 sidecar control-plane sync failure occurrence(s) within 20 minutes
Mesh control-plane degradation is evidenced separately from the workload sidecar symptom
Representative application impact: Readiness probe failed: HTTP probe failed with statuscode: 503
Mesh control-plane Service 'istiod' has no ready endpoints
Mesh control-plane Deployment 'istiod' has desired=2, available=0, unavailable=2
No ready mesh control-plane pods; degraded pod(s): istiod-6d8f8c7755-g4q2n, istiod-6d8f8c7755-mxq7r
Recent mesh control-plane event: Readiness probe failed: Get "http://10.42.12.88:15014/ready": dial tcp 10.42.12.88:15014: connect: connection refused
Observed 7 mesh control-plane failure event occurrence(s) within 20 minutes
Mesh control-plane and sidecar sync failures persisted for 2.2 minutes

causes.message: Pod includes service-mesh sidecar 'istio-proxy' that depends on mesh control-plane state
The mesh control plane has no ready serving endpoints or is failing health checks
Sidecar 'istio-proxy' cannot receive mesh configuration, identity, or discovery updates
Application traffic or probes are blocked while the sidecar is unsynchronized

pod:payments-api-7c8db9f79b-2kq9m: Envoy proxy is NOT ready: config not received from Istiod: xDS connection error: rpc error: code = Unavailable desc = connection error: transport is closing
container:istio-proxy: Sidecar cannot sync mesh configuration from the control plane
container:payments-api: Readiness probe failed: HTTP probe failed with statuscode: 503
service:istiod: Mesh control-plane Service 'istiod' has no ready endpoints
deployment:istiod: Mesh control-plane Deployment 'istiod' has desired=2, available=0, unavailable=2
pod:istiod-6d8f8c7755-g4q2n: Mesh control-plane pod is not Ready while sidecars cannot sync
pod:istiod-6d8f8c7755-mxq7r: Mesh control-plane pod is not Ready while sidecars cannot sync
timeline:mesh_control_plane: Readiness probe failed: Get "http://10.42.12.88:15014/ready": dial tcp 10.42.12.88:15014: connect: connection refused

likely_causes: Mesh control-plane pods are crashlooping, failing probes, or not Ready
The mesh control-plane Service has no ready endpoints for sidecar xDS or identity traffic
Control-plane certificate, discovery, or webhook components are unavailable
A control-plane rollout or configuration change broke sidecar discovery and identity sync
suggested_checks: kubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app=istiod -o wide
Check mesh proxy sync status and control-plane readiness before debugging the app container
